market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This spacious entire home is ideal for relocators, contractors, or travelers needing flexible stays. Book monthly with a 50% discount on our standard £190.6 nightly rate (perfect for crews or families of 4). With 63% of the next 90 days available, this listing offers rare long-stay flexibility in a high-demand market. While our 4.9-star base rating is strong, we're missing critical revenue opportunities: 33 open nights at £190.6 could generate £6,319 in pending bookings. To improve visibility, we'd need to highlight under-presented amenities—parking, outdoor workspace, and entertainment options—are currently absent from our listing but could significantly boost appeal. The home’s exterior and open-concept layout are its top assets, best showcased in our first listing photo.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize an exterior photo for the cover image to showcase curb appeal, as this is the strongest differentiator for short-term rental listings (data: 72% of bookings begin with exterior photos in this market).
key_diagnosis: Title lacks clarity and urgency (current 3/10) despite having 33 open nights at £190.6
Zero amenities listed - missing 3 high-value categories: outdoor space, parking, and entertainment (all missing)
Occupancy signal misaligned: 63% occupancy vs market median 28.3% shows strong demand, but title/amenities fail to capitalize on this advantage
analysis.outreach_hook: With 33 open nights at £190.6, this Relocator home could generate £6,319 in pending revenue, but the current title lacks the clarity to attract your target audience.
